title: The Creator's Canvas

sections.label: Intro
lines: From the edges of the sky, let joy arise,
Sing to the One who paints the morning skies,
In melodies of stars, our voices unite,
Praise in the rhythm of eternal light.

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: He crafts the heavens with whispers and dreams,
Calls the oceans, molds the streams.
Mountains bow, the forests sway,
All of creation knows His way.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: From east to west, the earth proclaims,
A boundless love that has no name.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Lift your voice, let it soar,
Sing the song of forevermore!
With every breath, a love displayed,
The dance of life, the music He made.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: His word, a flame, unyielding, pure,
A fortress strong, steadfast and sure.
He shatters chains, He lifts the poor,
His mercy floods through every door.

sections.label: Bridge
lines: Who can stand against His might?
The stars align to crown His light.
Grace descends, a quiet rain,
Washing away all fear and pain.
Lift your voice, let it soar,
Sing the song of forevermore!
With every breath, a love displayed,
The dance of life, the music He made.

sections.label: Outro
lines: From the edges of the sky, let joy arise,
Praise in the rhythm of eternal light.

epigraph: sing unto him with the psaltery and an instrument of ten strings
styleNote: Building With Rhythmic Intensity · Choir-Like Harmonies Swelling · Finale: Grand Orchestral Crescendo
